title: I'm Club-to-Death Angel! Dokuro-chan!
overview: Sakura has to adjust to Dokuro, her killings, his classmates wailing on him, and trying to keep his sanity in the pilot.

title: The Assassin from the Future! Dokuro-chan!
overview: Sakura meets Sabato where she and Dokuro finally explain why they have been sent to assassinate him.

title: Cupid of Love! Dokuro-chan!
overview: Sakura and Shizuki help Miyamoto have a get together with his secret admirer.

title: New Cinema Paradise! Dokuro-chan!
overview: Sakura and Shizuki go to the movies for a date, but things go awry when Dokuro follows and when Sabato remakes an appearance.

title: Field Trip! Dokuro-chan!
overview: The class goes on a camping trip where Sakura tries to impress Shizuki, but tries not to be killed by Dokuro for various reasons.

title: Test of Courage! Dokuro-chan!
overview: The class goes on a test of courage through a dark forest to reach a mountain peak. With Shizuki getting lost in the forest, Sakura tries to search for her.

title: It's Zakuro-chan! Dokuro-chan!
overview: Sakura meets Zakuro where she explains that she needs to take Dokuro back to the future.

title: Farewell! Dokuro-chan!
overview: Sakura is left with a choice if he wants Dokuro to stay with him or not.

title: Sketching Event! Dokuro-chan!
overview: Sakura, Dokuro and Shizuki are on a school trip where they are asked to draw the scenery, but not without Dokuro harassing him most of the time.

title: Bubbles and Scrubbing Battle! Dokuro-chan!
overview: After Dokuro and Zakuro are scared of a "monster" they read about in a myth book, they then want (and force) Sakura to join them in the bath.

title: Accidents Happen in Closed Spaces! Dokuro-chan!
overview: Sabato's mother informs everyone that Sabato has to return to the future, but Sakura tries to stop her from leaving, thus everyone ends up in a prison cell. Many attempts to escape go very wrong.

title: Valentine's Day Kiss! Dokuro-chan!
overview: Dokuro makes Sakura chocolate, shaped of himself, for Valentine's Day. However, she adds a special "binkan sausage" which makes Sakura really "special" and also gives him an allergic reaction. Zansu, Dokuro, and Zakuro then try to help him overcome the allergy, but all are unknown to the fact that Zansu may have a bigger goal in mind.
